access_fetch.next_step: Compare the external fetch pattern against the target repo's ingestion layer.

source_intake.next_step: Check whether this repo suggests reusable source-system or adapter conventions.

parsing_extraction.next_step: Review whether parsing and normalization patterns improve data quality.

export_feed_api.next_step: Treat as a distribution pattern layered on top of the project core.

distribution_plugin.next_step: Evaluate as adjacent product surface rather than core system logic.

ui_discovery_surface.next_step: Keep surface ideas separate from ingestion or truth layers.

location_place_enrichment.next_step: Treat as enrichment unless the target project is explicitly place-first.

connector_families.suggested_next_step: Review whether this should inform adapter families, not just one-off integrations.

source_systems_and_families.suggested_next_step: Compare the repo against the target's source-system architecture.

distribution_surfaces.suggested_next_step: Read as a surface/distribution signal layered on top of the core.

location_and_gastro_intelligence.suggested_next_step: Treat as enrichment signal unless the project already has strong geo semantics.

risk_and_dependency_awareness.suggested_next_step: Use primarily as a risk or anti-pattern signal.

patternTensions.cms_distribution_plugin: Plugin-heavy patterns usually belong outside the core truth or ingestion engine.
patternTensions.event_discovery_frontend: Discovery surfaces can be useful without changing the project core.
patternTensions.platform_based_place_enrichment: Platform-bound enrichment should stay controlled and optional.
